tweets.text: Human traffickers use buses, trains, and planes to transport their victims. Reporting the signs you recognize can help bring these victims to safety. Learn how to report and what to say: https://t.co/no0GyzxIV1. https://t.co/VKmlJBj148
tweets.text_resolved: Human traffickers use buses, trains, and planes to transport their victims. Reporting the signs you recognize can help bring these victims to safety. Learn how to report and what to say: https://go.dhs.gov/JVE. https://t.co/VKmlJBj148

author.description: Blue Campaign is the unified voice for @DHSgov efforts to combat #HumanTrafficking through public awareness and education. Together, we can #EndTrafficking.

tweets.text: Human trafficking victims may not be able to speak up and ask for help due to fear, blackmail, or trauma. You can be the one to break the silence. Learn to recognize the signs of human trafficking and how you can help: https://t.co/FJKiDnuYnh. https://t.co/f1Rl2S50jY
tweets.text_resolved: Human trafficking victims may not be able to speak up and ask for help due to fear, blackmail, or trauma. You can be the one to break the silence. Learn to recognize the signs of human trafficking and how you can help: https://go.dhs.gov/ZAe. https://t.co/f1Rl2S50jY

media.alt_text: A young man sitting on a bed by a window, holding his head in distress, illustrating internal struggle and silence. Quote overlaid  on the image reads "Even though I was screaming on the inside, I couldn't ask for help" with a call to action to learn the indicators of human trafficking.

author.description: Blue Campaign is the unified voice for @DHSgov efforts to combat #HumanTrafficking through public awareness and education. Together, we can #EndTrafficking.

tweets.text:
Human traffickers will be prosecuted to the fullest extent of the law for their crimes. 

Learn what you can do to help combat human trafficking: https://t.co/FJKiDnuYnh.
#EndTrafficking https://t.co/yf0IypyDKK

media.alt_text: Blue background with bold text saying 'Fighting for Freedom' highlighting to swipe for a story of surviving human trafficking.

A silhouette of a person walking down a dimly lit street at night, text reads "A man recruited multiple women to perform sexual services for money in 2024. He forced them to work around the clock and kept them trapped under the threat of violence."

Close-up of a law enforcement officer holding open handcuffs with a detained person in the background. Text reads, "That is, until HSI San Antonio found them and arrested their trafficker. He was sentenced on September 19th and is now serving time for his crimes."
Police officer in uniform holding a body camera with flashing red lights in the background, with text reading "This is what justice looks like."

author.description: Blue Campaign is the unified voice for @DHSgov efforts to combat #HumanTrafficking through public awareness and education. Together, we can #EndTrafficking.

tweets.text: The English session of our Human Trafficking 101 webinar is tomorrow! Don’t forget to register to learn valuable information about human trafficking and what you can do to fight it. We’ll also be hosting the webinar in Spanish on the 29th. Register here: https://t.co/KMwneQ4h4y. https://t.co/B7Cwk2ox0R

media.alt_text: Close-up of a person being comforted, promoting a webinar on January 28th and 29th about recognizing and reporting human trafficking with a call to register.

author.description: Blue Campaign is the unified voice for @DHSgov efforts to combat #HumanTrafficking through public awareness and education. Together, we can #EndTrafficking.

tweets.text:
The National Human Trafficking Hotline is available 24/7 to receive your reports of human trafficking and connect victims with services. All it takes is someone to speak up and break the silence. 

Learn how to use your voice to stop human trafficking: https://t.co/no0GyzxIV1. https://t.co/Plt7sy6U3J

author.description: Blue Campaign is the unified voice for @DHSgov efforts to combat #HumanTrafficking through public awareness and education. Together, we can #EndTrafficking.

tweets.text:
Human trafficking happens in many different industries—it can even be happening right in front of us. It’s up to all of us to recognize the signs and break the silence. 

Learn how to see behind the crowd: https://t.co/iDkM9o5z1W. #TacklingTrafficking https://t.co/VbKsOJxj0Y

tweets.text: By building awareness and reinforcing the critical role transportation professionals play in prevention and public safety, this training highlighted how informed action can help disrupt trafficking and protect vulnerable people.

tweets.text:

author.description: Blue Campaign is the unified voice for @DHSgov efforts to combat #HumanTrafficking through public awareness and education. Together, we can #EndTrafficking.

tweets.text:
Ahead of the big game, we’re partnering with the @Tim Tebow Foundation to show how you can tackle human trafficking.  

Large events like this weekend’s game can reveal instances of human trafficking. Learn to see the signs and report them: https://t.co/OyKUWp71hl. https://t.co/wK1YP6HkpL

tweets.text:
Human trafficking exists everywhere—in small towns and big cities, in hotels, stores, and clubs.  

If you’re attending the big game, notice the signs around you. Learn what to look for: https://t.co/OyKUWp71hl.   

#TacklingTrafficking https://t.co/kOjMyqJmOy

tweets.text:

#TacklingTrafficking https://t.co/fFJ8XHXb9x

tweets.text:
Traffickers can be experts at appearing as the perfect partner, declaring false promises and “love-bombing” to gain their victim’s trust and exploit them. 

Learning the red flags is the first step to staying safe: https://t.co/SzbrwgxpoO. 

#RedFlags https://t.co/pqBpW1qXi1

tweets.text:
Cocoa farms have a long history of using child labor, exposing kids to dangerous tools and chemicals to harvest cocoa beans. Do you know where your favorite chocolate comes from? 🍫 

Learn about goods made with forced labor: https://t.co/N4cy5M5nhV. 

#ForcedLabor https://t.co/3rEPiat76p

tweets.text:
If your partner is exploiting you, that is not love, and it could be more dangerous than you think.  

Get help by calling 1-888-373-7888 or texting HELP to BeFree (233733).  

Learn common red flags: https://t.co/SzbrwgxpoO. 

#RedFlags https://t.co/nJlELx6R6M
